name: authorization_id_required
expression: authorization_id IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(authorization_id)) > 0
description: Authorization ID is the primary key for payer utilization management tracking.

name: request_status_valid
description: Prior authorization workflow routing depends on a recognized request status.

name: member_id_present
expression: patient_member_id IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(patient_member_id)) > 0
description: Member ID is required to reconcile the authorization with payer eligibility and claims.

name: provider_npi_format
expression: requesting_provider_npi IS NULL OR requesting_provider_npi REGEXP '^[0-9]{10}$'
description: Requesting provider NPI should be a ten digit numeric identifier.

name: denial_reason_required_for_denials
description: Denied prior authorizations need denial rationale to support appeals workflow.
